all_results.sql: SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3
all_results.my_result: [{"product_name":"The North Face Nuptse Jacket","revenue":"530.0"},{"product_name":"Nike Air Force 1 Low","revenue":"300.0"},{"product_name":"Adidas Ultraboost Light","revenue":"280.0"}]
all_results.agent_a_result: 1. The North Face Nuptse Jacket - £530.00, 2. Nike Air Force 1 Low - £300.00, 3. Adidas Ultraboost Light - £280.00

all_results.sql: SELECT p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')
SELECT SUM(quantity) as total_qty FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as total_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE channel = 'online' AND status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as online_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.channel = 'online' AND o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as store_revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.channel = 'store' AND o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

SELECT o.region, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY o.region ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNTIF(returned = true) as returned_count, COUNT(*) as total_items, ROUND(COUNTIF(returned = true) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as return_rate FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')
all_results.agent_a_result: 1 returned out of 17 items, return rate 5.88%

all_results.sql: SELECT i.stock_level, i.reorder_point FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'The North Face Nuptse Jacket' AND i.distribution_center = 'Glasgow'

SELECT p.product_name, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.distribution_center = 'Manchester' ORDER BY i.stock_level DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT i.stock_level, i.reorder_point FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'ASICS Gel Kayano 31' AND i.distribution_center = 'Glasgow'
SELECT SUM(stock_level) as total_stock FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items
SELECT region, COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders WHERE status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT rrp, cost_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE product_name = 'Hoka Clifton 9'
SELECT rrp, cost_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE product_name = 'The North Face Nuptse Jacket'

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sale_price), 2) as avg_price FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')
SELECT brand, product_name, rrp FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY rrp ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT brand, product_name, rrp FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY rrp DESC LIMIT 1

all_results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.users WHERE loyalty_tier = 'platinum'
SELECT loyalty_tier, COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.users GROUP BY loyalty_tier ORDER BY count DESC

all_results.sql: SELECT i.distribution_center, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'Nike Air Force 1 Low'

SELECT i.distribution_center, i.stock_level FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'Hoka Clifton 9'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis-ai-499819.jd_sports.products
